what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG line icon showing five circular nodes arranged as four corners around a middle node, with diagonal connector paths linking the corner nodes to the middle node.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with viewBox 0 0 24 24.
Draws five circles with matching radius values.
Uses currentColor for stroke and no fill.
Sets stroke width to 1.5 with round caps and joins.
Connector paths link each outer circle toward the middle circle.
standouts: Single compact SVG element with no embedded styling or metadata.
conventions: Follows common icon conventions: 24x24 viewBox, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded line caps and joins.
Uses explicit SVG primitives rather than external references or symbols.
Keeps geometry fixed in the SVG markup.
notes: A compact reusable line icon for representing a people network or connected group.
purpose_vs_actual: Filename suggests a people-network icon; the SVG content matches by depicting connected circular person-like nodes.
intention_signals: It appears intended to communicate a connected group of people using a simple scalable icon that inherits surrounding text or UI color.
novelty: Uses four outer nodes connected diagonally to one middle node within a compact 24x24 icon grid.
contribution: Provides a reusable people-network pictogram with inherited color, simple strokes, and balanced node-and-link geometry for a fused design asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon depicting five connected circular nodes as a people network.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing connected people, teams, or relationships in a reusable design-system icon asset.
